'''ây-sh-ng-y''' ('''kayashngeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vousvoyer|vousvoyer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-ng-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vousvoyer|vousvoyer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-sh-ng-y
|-
! Lemma
| kayashngeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyashngeyoko|thiyashngeyoko]] || [[word:jiyashngeyoko|jiyashngeyoko]] || [[word:shiyashngeyoko|shiyashngeyoko]] || [[word:kiyashngeyoko|kiyashngeyoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
